creator: mdsl21@gmail.com
text:
I have tried to install tetex from ports, but got a strange error:

> tetex-texmf-3.0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/teTeX.
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.funet.fi/pub/TeX/CTAN/systems/unix/teTeX/3.0/distrib
fetch: ftp://ftp.funet.fi/pub/TeX/CTAN/systems/unix/teTeX/3.0/distrib/tetex-texmf-3.0.tar.   file not found, no access)
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ctan.unsw.edu.au/tex-archive/systems/unix/teTeX/3.0/dist
tetex-texmf-3.0.tar.gz                        100% of   87 MB 6688  Bps 00m00s
===>  Extracting for teTeX-texmf-3.0_5
=> MD5 Checksum mismatch for teTeX/tetex-texmf-3.0.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum mismatch for teTeX/tetex-texmf-3.0.tar.gz.
=> MD5 Checksum OK for teTeX/dvipsk-jpatch-p1.6a1.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for teTeX/dvipsk-jpatch-p1.6a1.tar.gz.
===>  Refetch for 1 more times files: teTeX/tetex-texmf-3.0.tar.gz teTeX/tetex-texmf-3.0.tar.
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> tetex-texmf-3.0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/teTeX.

Fix: 

I dont know :) M.b., fix distinfo... But why "tetext-texmf-3.0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/teTeX" if it really exist in this directory?


[root@mdsl /usr/ports/distfiles/teTeX]# ls -al
total 114980
drwxr-xr-x   2 root  wheel       512  7 май 21:59 .
drwxr-xr-x  15 root  wheel     66560  7 май 20:54 ..
-rw-r--r--   1 root  wheel     29397  7 дек  2004 dvipsk-jpatch-p1.6a1.tar.gz
-rw-r--r--   1 root  wheel       604  6 дек  2005 tetex-3.0_p1-gentoo.tar.gz
-rw-r--r--   1 root  wheel  12749314  6 фев  2005 tetex-src-3.0.tar.gz
-rw-r--r--   1 root  wheel  13357541  7 янв  2006 tetex-src-3.0_p1.tar.gz
-rw-r--r--   1 root  wheel  91402377 25 май  2006 tetex-texmf-3.0.tar.gz

Checksum is really mismatch:

[root@mdsl /usr/ports/distfiles/teTeX]# md5 tetex-texmf-3.0.tar.gz
MD5 (tetex-texmf-3.0.tar.gz) = a917c3366f2e306ecbe478a2923020b3

But MD5 from distinfo is:

MD5 (teTeX/tetex-texmf-3.0.tar.gz) = ed9d30d9162d16ac8d5065cde6e0f6fa

It isn't a file corruption because i tried to fetch tetex-texmf three times.

Please, help! :)
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/print/tetex
make
